rows.label: tev074201_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev074201_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Nen'celeg about Nightglow Forest.

rows.label: tev074201_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev074201_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Nen'celeg about recent developments.

rows.label: tev074201_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Nen'celeg about Nightglow Forest.

rows.label: tev074201_MSG0001
rows.name:
Nightglow Forest is rife with
dangerous indigens. It is certainly
not a safe place to visit.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev074201_MSG0002
rows.name:
Nevertheless, I find my trips there
to be calming. You might say that for
us Orphe, it puts our Ovah at ease.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev074201_MSG0003
rows.name:
When I visited there recently, I
discovered Absop's swallowtails
at a place called Rust Lake.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev074201_MSG0004
rows.name:
I couldn't stop watching them. At the
moment of their deaths, they emit the
most radiant light. It's incredible.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev074201_MSG0005
rows.name:
I want to do more research. I suspect
there may be some connection between
that place and the origins of we Orphe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev074201_MSG0013
rows.name:
Thank you for rescuing
me in Nightglow Forest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev074201_MSG0014
rows.name:
You need not worry about me any longer. Having
found a promising subject for my research, I do
not intend to leave NLA again for some time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev074201_MSG0015
rows.name:
You are curious about my
research subject? Well, it
is none other than Nan'celeg.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev074201_MSG0016
rows.name:
He seems to have some interest in me, yet
does not seem to understand the fundamental
reasoning behind that interest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev074201_MSG0017
rows.name:
We Orphe are more interesting than any indigen.
I intend to use Nan'celeg as a test subject
in researching the way we Orphe think.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev074201_MSG0025
rows.name:
There is a place at the heart of Nightglow
Forest that sets my Ovah aflutter.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev074201_MSG0026
rows.name:
I know there is something there. Something
other than indigens and the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev074201_MSG0027
rows.name:
I would love to perform a more thorough
study, but Nan'celeg will not permit it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev074201_MSG0028
rows.name:
I could ignore his objections, but
I have no desire to worry him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev074201_MSG0029
rows.name:
Every day I scour FrontierNet for
information as I fight back the
urge to run off there myself.[ST:wait ]
